overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night. The character navigates past pedestrians, steam vents, and holographic advertisements before crossing a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles.

screen fades to black indicating a transition

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the character walking past a yellow vendor kiosk and a glowing PAIN SHOP sign. Steam rises from street vents while neon advertisements illuminate the wet pavement. A blue sports car passes by on the right before the screen fades to black at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with protective bollards and digital billboards

events.description: screen fades back in from black, resuming the walk
character begins angling toward the crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians with cybernetic enhancements and futuristic fashion

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and black outfit walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: smooth teal-colored modern building facade with large vertical windows
short black posts with yellow stripes lining the sidewalk edge
large holographic advertisement displaying red neon text and graphics

segments.scene_description: After a brief fade to black, the scene resumes with the character walking past a teal building wall and black bollards lining the sidewalk. The character approaches a large intersection with digital billboards visible ahead, preparing to cross the street as the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with yellow zebra crossing and futuristic traffic

events.description: character steps off sidewalk onto the yellow striped crosswalk
white delivery van passes left to right in front of the character
yellow sports car speeds through the intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: character crosses the wide intersection, navigating between passing vehicles while heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving across the intersection from left to right
yellow sports car speeding through the crosswalk ahead of the character

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and green directional arrows
red pedestrian signal box mounted on black pole with walk symbol illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide intersection with a yellow zebra crosswalk, crossing the multi-lane street amidst moderate traffic. A white van passes in front, followed by a yellow sports car speeding through. Neon-lit buildings surround the intersection as the character navigates to the opposite side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that transitions from a narrow, neon-lit sidewalk into a wide, bustling city intersection. It begins with the character walking past a yellow vendor kiosk and a glowing PAIN SHOP sign, where steam rises from street vents and a blue sports car glides past on the wet pavement. As the camera continues forward, the scene shifts toward a teal building wall and a line of black bollards that guide the path toward a horizon of towering digital billboards. The movement then expands into a wide intersection, where the character navigates a yellow zebra crosswalk amidst the flow of traffic. Finally, the shot concludes as a white van and a yellow sports car speed past, surrounded by the vibrant glow of neon-lit buildings.
